name: Task Scheduler
description: Intelligent task planning, scheduling, and reminder system
author: NexusClaw Team

prompts.create_task: Create a task with: Title: {title}, Description: {description}, Priority: {priority}, Due date: {due_date}. Suggest optimal time slots based on: {constraints}
prompts.break_down_project: Break down this project into actionable tasks: {project_description}. For each task provide: 1) Task name, 2) Estimated time, 3) Dependencies, 4) Priority level
prompts.schedule_optimization: I have these tasks: {task_list}. Optimize my schedule for {time_period} considering: 1) Task priorities, 2) Estimated durations, 3) My available hours: {available_hours}, 4) Energy levels: {energy_pattern}
prompts.reminder_smart: Set a smart reminder for: {task}. Consider: 1) Task urgency, 2) Preparation time needed, 3) Related tasks, 4) Optimal notification timing
